name: ca-codex
description: Beta governance kernel for OpenAI Codex CLI: the full codeArbiter surface — 37 ca-prefixed governance skills (spec-driven /feature pipeline, nine-gate commit gate, ADRs, audits) plus the enforcement hooks (persona injection at SessionStart, blocking pre-exec and pre-write gates, append-only audit trail) — sharing one .codearbiter/ store with the Claude Code sibling plugin. Standalone: opt a repo in with the ca-init skill (no Claude-side install required); enforcement stays dormant until the shared .codearbiter/CONTEXT.md carries 'arbiter: enabled'. Requires Python 3 on PATH and Codex >= 0.134.0.
